title: Database describe
description: Given a database with multiple tables, when I call db.describe(), it should return a complete schema overview: all tables with their GSIs, associations, record counts, and staleness status. Spec: features/query/database_describe.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: kicking off database describe story; will design specs to expose schema/state info. Next: write feature scenarios + impl after schema loader. Blockers: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: Python database.describe implemented & passing Behave; Rust describe pending. Next: port to Rust + Cucumber.
